#7 BENSON/PADILLA: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY R DUDUM. DEFT A SMITH PRESENT IN PRO PER. PLTF MOTS IN LIMINE #1-6 GRANTED, #7-8 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. PLTF MOT TO STRIKE JURY DEMAND DENIED. SHERIFF'S VENUE RET'D. ROLL CALL OF PROSPECTIVE JURORS. PROSPECTIVE JURORS SWORN. PRELIMINARY REMARKS BY COURT. VOIR DIRE BY COURT & PLTF. DEFT WAIVES VOIR DIRE. BOTH SIDE PASS FOR CAUSE. PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES. 12 JUROR & 2 ALTERNATES SWORN. JURY ORDERED BACK 9:15AM 1-22-97.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PLTF MOTION TO STRIKE DEFT'S JURY DEMAND FOR SUBMISSION OF INCOMPLETE JURY INSTRUCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJ; MAY BE RENEWED IN TRIAL COURT IF DEFT IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT MISSING INSTRUCTIONS BY TRIAL COURT JUDGE AND DOES NOT. NOTE: FILE NOT IN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, ANDREW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4135 ARMY ST #6, AKA CEASAR CHAVEZ ST, COSTS PER COST BILL.
